falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Indicates a blowoff top formation, contradicting the current HOLD signal and bottom pattern similarity

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern match drops below 50% similarity to bottom_2024_aug
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Suggests the current price action diverges fundamentally from the historical bottom pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above $X (key resistance level from bottom_2024_aug pattern)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Breakout confirms invalidation of the original bottom pattern's structure

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
